title: ItsRainingRaincoats
descriptions: Worked on product requirements document (PRD) features to develop a donation collection scheduling chatbot for a non-profit organisation supporting migrant workers in Singapore.

title: Student Ambassadorial Programmes
role: Microsoft Student Ambassador · Perplexity Student Growth Partner
descriptions: Microsoft Student Ambassador (Jan 2026 – Present): Collaborating with 10 student ambassadors to drive 100,000 Copilot Chat student activations in Singapore, by organising technical workshops and events.
Perplexity Student Growth Partner (Aug – Dec 2025): Drove campus adoption and awareness of the AI-powered Comet Browser through community engagement.

title: NUS Students' Computing Club
descriptions: Represented 6000+ computing students, led a 72-strong team, and raised $54,450 through partnerships.

title: Hackathons
descriptions: Active hackathon participant across various themes including software, maritime, and social impact. Notable participations include Cursor Hackathon Singapore 2025, GovTech-NTU Product Club Hackathon 2025, GGEF Open Hack Singapore 2024 and NUS-RightShip Hackathon 2024.
